geography.data_source: BBMP ward boundaries 2023; Electronic City Industrial Township Authority (ELCITA) boundary maps; KIADB ITIR layout plans

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 ward-level data extrapolated with BBMP 2023 population estimates for Bommanahalli zone; literacy from Karnataka DISE 2021-22; SC/ST from Census 2011 Bangalore Urban district

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round PLFS for urban Karnataka adjusted with NASSCOM IT salary surveys 2023 and ELCITA employment census 2023; informal rate lower than Whitefield due to larger established companies (Infosys, Wipro campuses)

commute_profile.data_source: BMRCL Yellow Line (ORR-Airport) planning documents 2024 — stations under construction; company bus dominance from ELCITA transport survey 2023 (Infosys/Wipro shuttle networks); NICE Expressway connectivity reduces commute time; car ownership from RTO data 2023

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Similar to Whitefield IT Corridor profile; slightly lower political mobilisation due to larger share of migrant tech workers with limited local political engagement; estimated from Lokniti-CSDS 2024 and NSSO consumption data

social_network_parameters.data_source: Slightly lower connections than Whitefield due to campus-enclosed work culture; workplace-dominant network from ELCITA ecosystem survey; estimated from NASSCOM workforce mobility study 2023

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: BBMP trade license data 2023 for Electronic City Phase 1 commercial area; footfall from ELCITA crowd estimates during peak lunch hours
Neeladri Road market area; BBMP street vendor survey 2022; serves residential catchment of Electronic City Phase 2 apartments
Estimated from BBMP ward-level commercial license data; organic urban village commercial node serving IT worker residential areas

data_source: Composite zone config from Census 2011, NSSO PLFS 78th Round, BMRCL 2024 planning docs, DULT CMP 2020, ELCITA employment and transport surveys 2023, NASSCOM 2023, BBMP 2023
